ddls:
CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Game ID from the LoL API */,
  "blue_wins" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the blue team won the match */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date and time the match was played */,
  "match_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the match in minutes */,
  "patch_version" TEXT /* Patch version of the game */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament in which the match was played */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season in which the match was played */,
  "match_type" TEXT /* Type of match (e.g., regular, playoff, final) */,
  "map_name" TEXT /* Name of the map on which the match was played */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "blue_team_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of statistics */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the match ID */,
  "wards_placed" INTEGER /* Number of wards placed by the blue team */,
  "wards_destroyed" INTEGER /* Number of wards destroyed by the blue team */,
  "first_blood" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the blue team got first blood */,
  "kills" INTEGER /* Number of kills by the blue team */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths by the blue team */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists by the blue team */,
  "elite_monsters" INTEGER /* Number of elite monsters slain by the blue team */,
  "dragons" INTEGER /* Number of dragons slain by the blue team */,
  "heralds" INTEGER /* Number of heralds slain by the blue team */,
  "towers_destroyed" INTEGER /* Number of towers destroyed by the blue team */,
  "total_gold" INTEGER /* Total gold earned by the blue team */,
  "avg_level" REAL /* Average level of the blue team */,
  "total_experience" INTEGER /* Total experience gained by the blue team */,
  "total_minions_killed" INTEGER /* Total minions killed by the blue team */,
  "total_jungle_minions_killed" INTEGER /* Total jungle minions killed by the blue team */,
  "gold_diff" INTEGER /* Gold differential between the blue and red teams */,
  "experience_diff" INTEGER /* Experience differential between the blue and red teams */,
  "cs_per_min" REAL /* Creep score per minute for the blue team */,
  "gold_per_min" REAL /* Gold earned per minute for the blue team */,
  "first_tower" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the blue team got the first tower */,
  "first_inhibitor" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the blue team got the first inhibitor */,
  "first_baron" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the blue team got the first baron */,
  "first_rift_herald" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the blue team got the first rift herald */,
  "barons" INTEGER /* Number of barons slain by the blue team */,
  "inhibitors" INTEGER /* Number of inhibitors destroyed by the blue team */,
  "vision_score" INTEGER /* Vision score of the blue team */,
  "teamfight_wins" INTEGER /* Number of teamfights won by the blue team */,
  "objective_stolen" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the blue team stole an objective */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_blue_team_statistics_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "red_team_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of statistics */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the match ID */,
  "wards_placed" INTEGER /* Number of wards placed by the red team */,
  "wards_destroyed" INTEGER /* Number of wards destroyed by the red team */,
  "first_blood" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the red team got first blood */,
  "kills" INTEGER /* Number of kills by the red team */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths by the red team */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists by the red team */,
  "elite_monsters" INTEGER /* Number of elite monsters slain by the red team */,
  "dragons" INTEGER /* Number of dragons slain by the red team */,
  "heralds" INTEGER /* Number of heralds slain by the red team */,
  "towers_destroyed" INTEGER /* Number of towers destroyed by the red team */,
  "total_gold" INTEGER /* Total gold earned by the red team */,
  "avg_level" REAL /* Average level of the red team */,
  "total_experience" INTEGER /* Total experience gained by the red team */,
  "total_minions_killed" INTEGER /* Total minions killed by the red team */,
  "total_jungle_minions_killed" INTEGER /* Total jungle minions killed by the red team */,
  "gold_diff" INTEGER /* Gold differential between the red and blue teams */,
  "experience_diff" INTEGER /* Experience differential between the red and blue teams */,
  "cs_per_min" REAL /* Creep score per minute for the red team */,
  "gold_per_min" REAL /* Gold earned per minute for the red team */,
  "first_tower" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the red team got the first tower */,
  "first_inhibitor" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the red team got the first inhibitor */,
  "first_baron" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the red team got the first baron */,
  "first_rift_herald" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the red team got the first rift herald */,
  "barons" INTEGER /* Number of barons slain by the red team */,
  "inhibitors" INTEGER /* Number of inhibitors destroyed by the red team */,
  "vision_score" INTEGER /* Vision score of the red team */,
  "teamfight_wins" INTEGER /* Number of teamfights won by the red team */,
  "objective_stolen" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the red team stole an objective */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_red_team_statistics_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, coach, player, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed and salted password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last time the user logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the match */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the match was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the access occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournaments" (
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tournament */,
  "tournament_name" TEXT /* Name of the tournament */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the tournament */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the tournament */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the tournament */,
  "prize_pool" INTEGER /* Prize pool for the tournament */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "player_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of player statistics */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the match ID */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player ID */,
  "team_color" TEXT /* Color of the team (blue or red) */,
  "champion" TEXT /* Name of the champion played by the player */,
  "kills" INTEGER /* Number of kills by the player */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists by the player */,
  "total_gold" INTEGER /* Total gold earned by the player */,
  "cs" INTEGER /* Creep score of the player */,
  "vision_score" INTEGER /* Vision score of the player */,
  "damage_dealt" INTEGER /* Total damage dealt by the player */,
  "damage_taken" INTEGER /* Total damage taken by the player */,
  "crowd_control_time" INTEGER /* Total time spent in crowd control by the player */,
  "gold_per_min" REAL /* Gold earned per minute by the player */,
  "cs_per_min" REAL /* Creep score per minute by the player */,
  "wards_placed" INTEGER /* Number of wards placed by the player */,
  "wards_destroyed" INTEGER /* Number of wards destroyed by the player */,
  "first_blood_kill" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the player got the first blood kill */,
  "first_blood_assist" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the player assisted in the first blood */,
  "first_tower_kill" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the player got the first tower kill */,
  "first_tower_assist" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the player assisted in the first tower */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)
